HeroClaim: Engineering premium software architectures with unmatched technical integrity and aesthetic distinction.
PortfolioIntro: We design and build bespoke high-performance software systems. Our focus is on clean architecture, optimized data design, and maintainable codebases.
SuccessMsg: Request submitted successfully! Our team will contact you shortly.
Why1Desc: No nested agencies or intermediate bloat. You interact directly with architects and engineers executing your stack.
Why2Desc: We build code meant to last. Every function, database lookup, and UI layout is structured to stay maintainable for years.
Why3Desc: We embrace AI as a tool of the future, not for unverified 'vibe coding' slop. Every generated block is rigorously audited, tested, and integrated by senior engineers.
Why4Desc: Need existing software optimized, fixed, or updated? We step in, audit the core logic, and resolve bottleneck bugs rapidly.
Skills1Desc: High-performance services engineered using idiomatic Golang (lightweight routers like Chi, pgx driver, gRPC) and Node.js, integrated with PostgreSQL, Redis, and Kafka. We rely on clean SQL and explicitly reject bloated ORMs.
Skills2Desc: Native-quality iOS and Android applications utilizing React Native or Flutter, applying robust state management patterns (such as BLoC) to ensure UI performance and long-term maintainability.
Skills3Desc: Dynamic, optimized web applications built with Next.js, React, Svelte, Alpine.js, and HTMX, styled via TailwindCSS and clean, reusable CSS systems.
Skills4Desc: We actively combat over-engineering. Technology choices are strictly contingent upon the specific technical task, scale, and business requirements of the project, delivering the simplest resilient path.
SkillsBadgeDesc: We deliver systems engineered for longevity and effortless scaling. Every codebase is structured to ensure that future feature additions, integrations, and handovers remain fast and frictionless.
PortfolioHeadline: Build or Improve your Project with TIVRI
PortfolioPitch: Our Portfolio is a Blank Canvas. As a new high-performance software engineering agency, we are actively seeking our first launch partners. Be the first to build a robust system or enhance your existing platform with our expert engineering team. We guarantee exceptional code quality, rigid testing, and expert architectural oversight. Special early partner terms and dedicated support apply.
ContactHeadline: Build or Improve a Project with TIVRI
ContactSub: For clients ready to construct a new app, or resolve bottlenecks in existing implementations, fill out our client questionnaire.
DirectMsgTitle: Just want to drop us a quick line?
DirectMsgSub: Click here to message us about vacancies, general queries, or greetings.
AboutHeading: The value of software is not in its volume, but in its integrity.
FooterIntro: Architecting resilient digital systems with absolute code integrity and structural clarity.
SocialsWarning: We are new and haven't launched our socials yet — coming soon.

ProjectScopeHint: Min 20 characters. Describe goals, stack, scale, or issues in your existing system.

LoginSubtitle: This area is restricted to site administrators.
DeadlineStepHint: Help us understand your project schedule and priority requirements.
DeadlineStrictDesc: Select if you have a launch target
DeadlineLabel: Do you have a strict launch deadline?
DeadlineSpecPlaceholder: Specify target date or timeframe (e.g. End of Q3, or October 15th)...
DeadlinePriorityInfo: Note: Requesting priority processing ensures your project is first in our queue, which may incur an additional fee. If another client has requested priority for the same period, we will coordinate and notify you regarding exact start windows.
HighQueueWarning: We are currently experiencing a high volume of project requests. Initial start times may be longer than expected.
AdminHighQueueHint: Enable to display a high-queue warning alert to new clients during intake.

MaintenanceText: We are currently conducting scheduled system maintenance. Please check back shortly.
MetaDescription: We design and build premium software architectures with unmatched technical integrity. Partner with senior engineers to build or scale your product.
